metadata.author: Moses
metadata.timePeriod: From the death of Joseph to the second year of the exodus
metadata.subject: Christ is the redemption, salvation, and supply of God's people and the means for them to worship and serve God so that they may be built up with God together for His dwelling.

1: Now these are the names of the sons of Israel who came to Egypt with Jacob; each came with his household:
Dan and Naphtali, Gad and Asher.
And all the persons who came forth from the loins of Jacob were seventy persons; and Joseph was already in Egypt.
And Joseph died, and all his brothers, and all that generation.
And the children of Israel were fruitful and increased abundantly and multiplied and became exceedingly strong, and the land was filled with them.
2: And a man of the house of Levi went and took as a wife a daughter of Levi.
And the woman conceived and bore a son; and when she saw that he was a fine child, she hid him three months.

1.text: In the Bible, Egypt is a type of the world, whose ruler is the Pharaoh (Satan), holding God's people in bondage.

2.text: Heb. good. This indicates that God’s hand was upon Moses from his birth to prepare him as the deliverer.
